examples:
Command Example
#
#### Human Readable Output
### f5-asm-policy-parameters-list
***
Lists all policy parameters.
#### Base Command
`f5-asm-policy-parameters-list`

outputs.description: The ID of the signature. f5.Signatures.selfLink The self link to the specific signature.
outputs.name: f5.Signatures.id

outputs.description: Indicates whether the signature should be staged. f5.Signatures.lastUpdateMicros The datetime of the last update represented in micro seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 GMT (Unix epoch). For example, 1519382317000000 is Friday, 23 February 2018 10:38:37.
outputs.name: f5.Signatures.performStaging
